name: Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups All-Purpose Flour, do not pack
recipeInstructions:
To make sour milk, place 1 tablespoon vinegar in a measuring cup and fill to the 1 cup mark with milk.
Break egg into a bowl; beat. Stir in milk, sugar, cornmeal, Mix, and baking soda. Stir quickly and vigorously until just mixed. Pour batter into an 8 by 8 by 2-inch square pan, bottom rubbed with shortening. Bake in a 425°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes.
CORNMEAL MUFFINS: Pour Corn Bread Batter into 12 greased muffin cups. Bake in a 425°F oven about 20 minutes.
